WebDggrid
Main Navigation HomeGuideAPIDemo

Appearance

WebDggridDGGRID in the Browser

A WebAssembly wrapper for the DGGRID C++ library — generate and query Discrete Global Grid Systems (DGGS) directly in the browser or Node.js.

Getting Started
API Reference
Live Demo

WebAssembly Powered

The full DGGRID C++ library compiled to WASM — no server required. Runs in any modern browser or Node.js environment.

Multiple Grid Topologies

Supports HEXAGON, TRIANGLE, SQUARE, and DIAMOND topologies with ISEA and FULLER projections at any resolution.

GeoJSON Ready

Convert coordinates to DGGS cell IDs and back, or export entire grid regions directly as GeoJSON FeatureCollections for use with mapping libraries.
